questionEdit.editedStem: REAL011 修订后题干：已调整题干、分值、难度和来源框。

rollback: delete from review_queue_items where payload->>'questionItemId' = '39e497ce-4ee8-4e7c-96c9-d44eb14c9464' or payload->>'sourceRegionId' = 'e18e5c30-3139-4de2-adb8-efb631a478c6'; delete from question_blocks where question_item_id = '39e497ce-4ee8-4e7c-96c9-d44eb14c9464'; delete from question_items where id = '39e497ce-4ee8-4e7c-96c9-d44eb14c9464';
summaryChinese: 题干、答案、解析、题型、分值、难度和 SourceRegion bbox 均可修订，且题目与来源框修订都有 audit。
